name: codex-auto-orchestrator
description: Plan substantial Codex tasks with Sol Max, route Sol/Terra/Ultra workers, control Fast per reasoning level, and recover durable background jobs with observed-call evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Route Sol, Terra, Ultra, and Fast with durable controls.
interface.longDescription: Resolves a per-model Fast policy before Sol Max planning, selects direct, parallel, or native Ultra execution, runs a temporary recoverable controller, accepts steering and pause/resume controls, verifies actual model/reasoning plus explicit and observable Service Tier evidence, and integrates the reviewed result.
interface.defaultPrompt: 自动编排完成这个任务：
